some fun fact but in Derleth version of Cthulhu Mythos all gods on physical worlds belonged to 4 elements (idr exalt detail)
the biggest ones are
Cthulhu = Water 
Hastur = Wind
Cthugha = Fire

also there's opposing and allying elements, like Water like Wind but hate Fire
so in his version Hastur and Cthulhu are brothers
and Cthugha oppose Cthulhu
at least thats (supposedly) what the case was for pickman
